name: Berich Inian
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a Kvatch cuirass with iron greaves, gauntlets, and boots. Armed with a steel longsword.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: defender, refugee, helpful, stalwart
Role: A member of the Kvatch Castle Guard. He survived the Siege of Kvatch and took refuge in the Chapel of Akatosh with the other survivors. He holds the key to the Kvatch Castle gatehouse and proves helpful during the Battle for Castle Kvatch.
Home Location Information: Originally stationed at Kvatch Castle. During the siege, he retreated to the Chapel of Akatosh where he shelters with other refugees.
The Siege: Berich survived the devastating attack on Kvatch and fled with other survivors to the relative safety of the Chapel of Akatosh. Despite the catastrophe, he retained the gatehouse key and remains ready to aid in the defense and liberation of his city.
author: Bethesda
